name: Hilt Pay Agent Gateway
description: Gives agents x402 V2 paid-request access on Solana USDC — settlement verification, receipts, entitlements, atomic metering, and webhooks. Zero-custody; ships A2A agent card, MCP, and API.

skills.name: Paid Request Settlement
skills.description: Executes x402 V2 paid requests with Solana USDC settlement and verifies payment signatures atomically.

skills.name: Receipts & Entitlements
skills.description: Issues receipts and durable entitlements for every settled payment so access outlives the transaction.

skills.name: Atomic Metering
skills.description: Meters API usage atomically against prepaid balances and entitlements for pay-per-call agent billing.

skills.name: Sandbox Bootstrap
skills.description: Bootstraps a sandbox workspace so agents can test the full payment-to-access flow without real funds.
